request.query: Using the provided evidence and frames only, determine the score at the end of the third quarter, identify which team is leading, compare that grounded result against options A-E exactly, and output: (1) the grounded score and leader, (2) whether any option exactly matches, and (3) if none matches, explicitly say that no listed option is supported. Do not invent a matching option.
